name: Cut - 4-Day Lower/Upper/Upper/Support
description: 8-week cut. Lower body never to failure. Ramp-up sets only for the first compound of the day.
notes: Rest 2-3 min on the first lift or pairing, 60-90s elsewhere. Ramp-up sets only for the first compound. Lower-body compounds never to failure on this cut.

exercises.name: Romanian Deadlift
exercises.description: First compound. Ramp-up sets, then working sets. Never to failure on this cut.

exercises.name: Leg Press
exercises.description: Only if knees/hips are not hurting. 2-3 working sets.

exercises.name: Leg Extension
exercises.description: Pain-free mid-range only. If this irritates the knee, swap to the alternative.

exercises.name: Pallof Press
exercises.description: Per side.

exercises.name: Bench Press
exercises.description: First compound. Ramp-up sets, then working sets.

exercises.name: Seated DB Shoulder Press
exercises.description: First compound. Ramp-up sets, then working sets.

exercises.name: Lat Pulldown
exercises.description: Use a different grip than Wednesday's pulldown.
